Surname.jp: 遊び大好き魔王の眷属♪

description.en: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to grant increased <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率使自身的<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>效果提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy.\nDeals significantly increased damage if the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is currently increased, and deals <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> of the target's Max Health as fixed damage if the target is inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>Bleeding</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>이 증가한 상태라면 피해가 크게 증가하고, 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>출혈</color> 상태라면 대상 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 만큼 고정 피해를 입힙니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n自分に<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>UPがある場合、ダメージが大幅にUPし、対象が<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状態の場合、対象の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>の固定ダメージを与える。
description.zh: 攻击敌人。\n若自身的<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>处于提升状态,则使伤害大幅提升,并对处于<color=#28d9ed>出血</color>状态的目标造成相当于其生命值上限<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>的固定伤害。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases Speed by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> every time the caster takes a turn. (Max 5 stacks)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、スピードが<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。(最大5回まで累積)
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使速度提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。(最多可叠加5次)
